title: Revelations of Divine Love: All Shall Be Well
description: The first book written in English by a woman: Julian's visions of Christ's passion and the assurance that all shall be well.
introduction: The first book written in English by a woman: Julian's visions of Christ's passion and the assurance that all shall be well.

translation.text: All shall be well, and all shall be well, and all manner of thing shall be well.
